resources.string: Sorry! This device does not support Rotation Vector Sensor.
Couldn\'t launch wallpaper chooser. You can still activate Live Slider by choosing \"Live Wallpapers\" in your home screen wallpaper picker.

This Live Wallpaper can produce a parallax effect by slightly offsetting the position of the wallpaper.
*It is required to obtain the device\'s rotation angle data from Rotation Vector Sensor in real time. You can check whether your device supports the sensor by rotating the device and seeing whether the cube below changes its perspective.
Please select a wallpapers playlist to enable slideshow!
You can activate and edit wallpapers in this playlist right here and any previous selected wallpaper will be changed respectively.
Are you sure you want to disable current Playlist slideshow and continue with current single wallpaper selection…
Pause everything in battery saver mode
Animated overlay effects on your wallpaper
Slideshow time must be at least 3 seconds.

• Range: Controls the intensity of the parallax effect by zooming the image. Higher values create more movement as the image is translated more on sensor movements, but the image becomes more zoomed for greater bias range. The lowest value (0) completely shuts off the parallax animation with no sensor updates, while slideshow will still work normally.

• Speed: Adjusts how quickly the wallpaper responds to device rotation. Higher values make parallax react faster. For normal movements, smoothing is added as device sensor rotation values are not linear to tackle jittery effects. At maximum speed, there is no smoothing - if your device has a good sensor you may not see jittery effects, otherwise you know the drill.
• Power Saver Mode: Pauses all wallpaper effects when battery saver is enabled to conserve battery life.

• Wallpaper Slideshow: Automatically changes wallpapers from your selected playlist at set intervals. Minimum time interval is 3 seconds for performance reasons and inbuilt Android battery optimizations that freeze update callbacks for animations.
• Double Tap Wallpaper: Allows changing wallpapers by double-tapping the screen for quick wallpaper switching.

• Default: Sets the parallax face as default wherever your phone is facing at the moment. The wallpaper will animate with respect to that initial position. Simple calibration that works well for basic parallax effects.

• Vertical: Considers only 2 faces where ground and sky positions are detected. Perfect for users who mainly use their phone facing upwards during normal day usage and facing downwards when lying on the bed. Only recalibrates when switching between upright and upside-down orientations.

• Dynamic: Advanced mode that considers all 6 faces of the cube as possibilities. Wherever your phone is facing, the parallax wallpaper origin will update automatically based on the current phone direction (portrait, landscape, flat positions). Provides the most adaptive experience with automatic face detection and recalibration.
A helper cube is displayed that shows your current active face position as reference.

• Transition Animation: Choose the visual effect used when the wallpaper changes. Fade is a simple crossfade, Dissolve crumbles pixels away organically, Pixelate blocks and sharpens the image, Wipe sweeps the new image in from the left, Blur softens the old image out then sharpens the new one in, and Zoom grows the new image outward from the screen centre.
Advance slideshow each time screen turns on
Swap while screen is off — new wallpaper ready at wake
Shuffle wallpaper order after each full cycle
Use separate playlists for Home and Lock screen
Assign this playlist to the Home screen slideshow or the Lock screen slideshow?
Already set as Home screen playlist!
Already set as Lock screen playlist!
Please activate Live Slider as your live wallpaper first using the Activate tab.
Tap to set Live Slider as your Home Screen live wallpaper
Home screen is set.\nTap to also activate on the Lock Screen
That set the Home Screen instead. Please choose \"Lock screen\" when activating from here.
That set the Lock Screen instead. Please choose \"Home screen\" when activating from here.
Live Slider is active on both Home & Lock Screen ✓
